name: Pheasant with Champagne Cabbage IV (Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Pheasant with Champagne Cabbage II stock as directed.
2. For the Pheasant Sauce:
a. Cook the sugar in a small heavy saucepan over medium-high heat without stirring until caramelized (about 4 minutes).
b. Add gin and stock; bring to a boil, then reduce by half.
c. Stir in wine and return to a boil. Lower the heat and gradually incorporate butter, one or two pieces at a time, swirling gently until smooth.
d. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Note: Avoid aggressive culinary slang such as "kill the heat," "smash," "destroy," "burn," "splutter," or "execute." Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat."
